rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS JIMENEZ VS. KARIM BUSTAMI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Leave To File X-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 24, 2014, line 3: DEFENDANT OAK WONG, LAURA WONG Mtn For Leave To File X-Complaint OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005, i.e. served by mail on December 31, 2013, filed on January 2, 2014, set for hearing January 24, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUL D. DORN et al VS. EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION NOW DOING BUSINESS AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment Of Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 24, 2014, line 4: PLAINTIFF YUL DORN, THERESA DORN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment Of Dismissal OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005, i.e. motion filed on January 17, 2014, set for hearing January 24, 2014. Additionally, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. = (501/REQ)
